hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in /home/veejh/Projects/Website/vjroy.github.io/*) (cd /home/veejh/Projects/Website/vjroy.github.io && npx prettier --write --ignore-unknown "$f") ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true

cd /home/veejh/Projects/Website/vjroy.github.io 2>/dev/null && npm run check >/tmp/astro-check.log 2>&1 || echo '{"systemMessage":"astro check found type errors — run `npm run check` for details (full log: /tmp/astro-check.log)."}'
